title: mimulus langsdorffii
intro: Mimulus langsdorffii, also known as the great yellow monkey flower, is a perennial plant species native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as an antimicrobial agent to prevent infections. Mimulus langsdorffii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
